nasb.text: When David arose in the morning, the word of the Lord came to the prophet Gad, David’s seer, saying,

esv.text: And when David arose in the morning, the word of the Lord came to the prophet Gad, David’s seer, saying,

cnv.text: 大衛早晨起來；耶和華的話臨到迦得先知，就是大衛的先見，說：

ccb.text: 第二天早上，耶和华对大卫的先见——迦得先知说：
